description: Allow mapping gamepad buttons to keyboard key combos (e.g. Cmd+A, Ctrl+Left). Use CGEvent::new_keyboard_event to emit key events. Support modifier keys (Cmd, Ctrl, Alt, Shift) combined with any key. The combo definition needs a compact representation for persistence and a readable display for the UI (e.g. 'A+Left' means press A and Left arrow simultaneously). Consider whether this means keyboard keys or mixed mouse+keyboard.
title: Key combo actions
